title: Flea Treatment in Gravesend, Brooklyn | $350 – $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Gravesend, Brooklyn. Effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Gravesend home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Gravesend, Brooklyn, eliminating fleas at every life stage. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to protect your family and pets from these persistent pests.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Gravesend residents, we understand the unique pest challenges in this diverse Brooklyn neighborhood. Our licensed exterminators offer fast response times, pet-safe treatment options, and guaranteed results at transparent prices ranging from $350 to $650 depending on property size.
localContext: Gravesend's mix of single-family homes, multi-unit buildings along Avenue U and Kings Highway, and proximity to green spaces can make properties vulnerable to flea infestations, especially in homes with pets. From the historic homes near Gravesend Neck Road to newer developments, we've successfully treated flea problems across all of Gravesend's diverse housing stock.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Gravesend typically ranges from $350 to $650 depending on the size of your home or apartment, severity of infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as treatments target fleas at all life stages including eggs and pupae. We often recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely, then they can safely return home.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Gravesend, Brooklyn. Flea infestations can spread quickly, so we prioritize rapid response. Call us before noon for potential same-day service, or we can schedule an appointment that fits your timeline.
